tests.aql: SELECT UTF8(payload) FROM events WHERE devicetype=12 AND ("EventID" IN (1, 4688) OR "qidEventId" IN (1, 4688)) AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '% -ma %' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '% -mp %') AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/accepteula%' AND NOT (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%procdump.exe%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%procdump64.exe%')
